title: Fix Google Maps embed position/coordinates in LocationSection

requirements.text: In LocationSection.tsx, fix the Google Maps iframe so it correctly displays the map centered on the right coordinates for Dwarka Bartan Store, Akhnoor Palace, Jammu. The iframe embed URL must use a proper Google Maps embed URL (e.g., https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=... or the /embed?q= variant) that points accurately to the store's location at Akhnoor Palace, Jammu — not a generic or incorrect pin. The 'Get Directions' button must continue to link to https://maps.app.goo.gl/oxEd9nPJ4Ty4pYQL7. Verify the iframe renders the map at the correct physical position visually.

quotes: Sorry but no it is not at the correct position

acceptanceCriteria: The embedded Google Maps iframe in LocationSection.tsx visually shows a map pin at or near Akhnoor Palace, Jammu — not a different or default location.
The iframe uses a valid Google Maps embed URL (using /maps/embed? format) that loads correctly without errors.
The map section is visible and properly positioned within the Location section layout.

constraints: Do not modify any other section or component outside of LocationSection.tsx.
Do not change the 'Get Directions' button link — it must remain https://maps.app.goo.gl/oxEd9nPJ4Ty4pYQL7.
nonGoals: Changing any other address text or business hours.
Updating any other component beyond LocationSection.tsx.
